import { Button } from 'antd'; import { ArrowLeftOutlined } from '@ant-design/icons'; export const WebsiteRedesignContainer = ({ onBack }) => { return (

Website Redesign

This is the Website Redesign project page. Here you can find details about the project, its features, and how it was developed.

Projekt: Redesign the website of otto.de Tools: figma (Wireframes, Prototype, User Flows) Platform: Website As a second project I wanted to take an existing website and redesign it. Please note, that I am not linked to otto. I simply choose them, because they are a long existing, strong brand in germany. I decided for this company, because when using their website, I felt quite overwhelmed bu its structure and I couldnt pinpoint why. This sparked the interest in me to research, if I would notice the same with other shops and if not what they do different and how this shop could improve from their influence. The result was …. Because of that, I decided to redesign the website, with the overall goal to bring it closer to the app and to modernize it. Since this is a one-man-project I decided to focus on the following user flows: show user flows here I want to point out though, that in a real redesign, you wouldn’t just leave out features, that users might already be used to. This is were user rearch would come into play. Interviews, surveys and analytics of the behavoir of real shop visitors would be considered to figure out, which features are a must-have, can-do or not-needed type. When I compared the company to others, I noticed the three following features that I wanted to focus on: Feature: reason: Feature: reason: Feature: reason: design Figma Screenshots and prototype here: Working on this case study mde me realize, that creating a style for your shop, which then works for apps and websites, can be very tricky. The reason for that is … Because of my software developer background, I know that changing the entire style of a website is usually connected to a big workload and shouldnt be taken lightly. Therefore I will always suffice people to think about a global style, before they start adding an app when a website already exists (or visce virca). Summary: - Describe the final product. X is a tool that does Y, for customers. It solves the problem Z by doing A.
); }
